description_text: CAR'S Store Item description Item Description: Universal Lower Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit PU Spoiler Black Personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look. Modification&cutting required to fit properly. Universal custom fitment; Professional installation is required Specifications: Material: ABS Plastic Color:Gloss Black Dimension: 35.7 x 15.2 cm Fitment Type: Performance/Custom Surface Finish:Gloss Black, Placement on Vehicle: Rear Package Included: 1x Rear Body Bumper Diffuser Shark Fin Kit (adhesive tape are included) Notice: Please allow 1-3CM differs due to manual measurement. Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your understanding. Product overview Shipping Policy Payment Description Returns Policy About Us Item will be shipped out within 48 hours upon receipt of your payment. We ship the item through Hong Kong Air mail. Please make sure your address in eBay is correct. If you want to change the address, please give us ebay message right away you make the payment. Combing shipment is not allowed. If you wants to combine all the items together, you should still pay for all of the shipping, insurance and handing fees. Considering the cost of business and easy shipping, usually the item is packed in retail packaging.
